title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Bangalore. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
